summary: Project involves a multi-page app/website with Review, Filter, and Contact pages. User wants font colors changed to white where needed for readability across these pages.
known_issues: Font color not updated on Review, Filter, and Contact pages despite previous attempt

existing_features.title: On the Reviews page (and the CustomerReviews component used on Home), change all text elements — including review body text, reviewer names, star ratings, date labels, and any headings — to white or a light-contrast color (e.g., white or off-white) so they are fully legible against the dark background.

On the Menu page filter/tab section (MenuTabs component and any search/filter controls on the Menu page), change all filter tab labels, search input text, placeholder text, and category button text to white or a legible light color so they are visible against the dark or colored backgrounds.

On the Contact page (frontend/src/pages/Contact.tsx), change all text elements — including section headings, labels, address/phone/email info, business hours, form field labels, input placeholder text, and button text — to white or a light-contrast color wherever text appears against a dark or colored background.

new_feature_requests.summary: Change font color to white on Review page, Filter section, and Contact page where text is hard to read
